## Summary
- What changed and why?

## Type of Change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bugfix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] DevOps

## Scope
- Branch:
- Related issue:

## Validation
- [ ] Local tests pass
- [ ] `python manage.py check` passes
- [ ] Docker stack tested (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets committed

## Screenshots / Demo Notes
- Attach UI/API evidence where relevant.

## Rollback Plan
- How can this be reverted safely?
